title: Instagram
content: Sign up for Instagram to stay in the loop. Video by San Francisco Zoo on May 11, 2024. The Zoo’s male black rhino is named “Boone,” after the San Francisco 49ers’ former right tackle, Alex Boone. The Zoo manages its black rhino under the Association of Zoo and Aquarium’s Species Survival Plan for Black Rhinos. Video by San Francisco Zoo on June 28, 2026.
